questions.question: Who directed the movie 'Jaws'?
questions.explanation: Spielberg directed Jaws in 1975, which became a massive blockbuster.

questions.question: What band released 'Bohemian Rhapsody'?
questions.explanation: Queen released Bohemian Rhapsody in 1975 on the album 'A Night at the Opera'.

questions.question: What is the highest-grossing film of all time (unadjusted)?
In which TV show would you find the character Walter White?
questions.explanation: Bryan Cranston played Walter White in Breaking Bad (2008-2013).

questions.question: Who wrote the novel '1984'?
questions.explanation: George Orwell published 1984 in 1949, a year before his death.

questions.question: What video game franchise features a character named Master Chief?
questions.explanation: Master Chief (John-117) is the protagonist of the Halo series.

questions.question: Who composed 'The Four Seasons'?
questions.explanation: Vivaldi composed The Four Seasons around 1720 as part of 'Il cimento dell'armonia e dell'inventione'.

questions.question: What was the first feature-length animated film?
incorrectAnswers: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs (1937)
questions.explanation: El Apóstol was an Argentine political satire, though no copies survive today.

questions.question: Which author created the fictional world of Discworld?
questions.explanation: Pratchett wrote 41 Discworld novels between 1983 and 2015.

questions.question: What instrument does a pianist play?
questions.explanation: The piano was invented by Bartolomeo Cristofori around 1700.
